results.rendered_html: saṃ-sava m. (√3. su) a simultaneous Soma sacrifice, commingling or confusion of libations (when two Brāhmans perform the Soma sacrifice on the same spot and at the same time held to be sinful),  AitBr. ;  ŚrS.

results.rendered_html: saṃsava (von su mit sam) m. ein gleichzeitiges Soma-Opfer zweier benachbarter Gegner: vimatānāṃ prasavasaṃnipāte saṃsavo 'nantarhiteṣu nadyā vā parvatena vā  ĀŚV. ŚR. 6,6,11 .  AIT. BR. 1,3 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 24,14,23 . 25,14,8 .  LĀṬY. 1,11,12 .  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 13,5,1 .
